videos.title: Logitech Signature Comfort Plus Tutorial: Personalize Your F-Row Keys
videos.description:
Have you ever wondered if you can make your F-row keys do more than just the usual functions?

In this tutorial, learn how to fully customize the F-row keys on your Logitech Signature Comfort Plus keyboard using the Logi Options+ App. We walk you through four quick steps to transform your workflow: downloading the latest software from app.logi.com, connecting your device via Bluetooth, and navigating the intuitive Logi Options+ interface. videos.title: Meet Signature Comfort Plus combo
videos.description:
Work-life is a lot 😅
Meet Signature Comfort Plus, the wireless combo designed for all-day comfort, smoother workflows, and less desk-day fatigue. ✨
From the cushioned mouse and curved palmrest to Smart Actions, Easy-Switch, and AI shortcuts, everything’s built to help you work more comfortably across every device.
Plus: get 6 months of Perplexity Pro included with eligible purchases on Logitech.com 👀
